# zstack_policy_route_rule_set (Resource)

Manages Policy Route Rule Set resources in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Policy Route Rule Set.
- `vrouter_uuid` (String) The UUID of the virtual router.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Policy Route Rule Set.
- `type` (String) The type of the Policy Route Rule Set.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Policy Route Rule Set.
